They completed a 5500 sqft house in a few weeks under harsh conditions and always with a smile and positive attitude. Competitive prices and great customer care! Highly recommend their roofing services.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDL6ea_Kg&fid=0x0:0xfbbde8394ba614f2"],"When":"2024-6-28"},{"Name":"Lea Tyrrell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXYX8hAMR840OExJ51CQv3iVstHyl4glHfeIIPO-cTHififfKOFMw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We recently moved in to our new home in Langford – a 20 year old home that needed a new roof. We were looking to get solar panels in the future so wanted something durable, but we didn't want our home to end up looking like a warehouse on an industrial estate.  We also like to keep our business local. After doing a little detective work with friends and colleagues we heard about Soare Contracting. Marion and Kevin own this business and they were immediately helpful and provided great guidance on material selection and style. Easy to work with and amenable they were only too willing to do the leg work and come around to our house for meetings. Colby (won Kenobi) a true Jedi of the roofing arts and his team came to install our roof and they were polite, clean and quick. Whenever there were challenges Colby was always up front and honest and we always felt confident that he was helping us to make good decisions. The team was consistently accommodating to allow us to still live our lives and they worked around us rather than the other way around. When you have a big job like getting your roof replaced you kind of sign up to a month of disruption, but given the scheduling we hardly noticed that they were there. The finished product is great. Quiet in the rain, environmentally friendly, durable and nice to look at. We couldn’t be happier with our new roof. Thank you roof Jedi.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC-rN7VGw&fid=0x0:0xfbbde8394ba614f2"],"When":"2022-10-29"},{"Name":"Cheryl S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKoGRf12ctwoNAAV6Bh06J-0OYHDobkvXM-xSRTDOZCyWDbDQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Soare Contracting recently completed a metal roof and gutter install on our home and we would highly recommend them to anyone. From the initial contact requesting a quote, I could tell that Soare placed value on good customer service. Marion and Kevin were quick with answering questions and providing us with a quote, they also explained the process and timeline in detail. Once the project started, we were very fortunate to have a wonderful crew on site who were respectful, friendly, and diligent workers who took a lot of pride in the work they were doing. The roof and gutters look amazing! Thank you!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Thomas Homer-Dixon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXIklqnpFSqAw6R6Hno470-ZjaYysJAUrMbS8TugnmzqKt_cJP2=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Trevor and his team helped install and modify our metal roof (main house and garage) over a period of 18 months. All the work--including a complex, conical feature--was beautifully executed and technically perfect. Trevor also identified and fixed critical deficiencies left by a previous roofer. And he installed a roof-sprinkler system (for protection against wildfires) that required custom crafting of roof ladders and brackets for water hoses. We couldn't be happier with Soare Contracting. They're friendly, come in on budget, and are 100 percent reliable. And the roofs they build are works of art.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Evangeline01gnd","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLrNmIsxtPI8edntnOjF-dOrqWR_OPqIf-buJI-00DY7hHEGg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beyond exceptional service from Soare Roofing recently!  Kevin and Marion came to our rescue after a house fire.  They sympathized with our situation and kept in close touch until it came time to roof our home with top quality steel.  Their team of Trevor and Quinton were there when expected and worked very hard to get this job done and protect our home from further damage.  Everyone was a pleasure to work with from start to finish.  We'd highly recommend Soare for your roofing project.  Truly a pleasure and we (and all the neigbourhood) are thrilled at the results.  Many thanks!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Joss Fontaine","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK_atvMXKcabItzqqYD_OFoLKRusHX8H6p4yKNkIx3riJRwpA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We decided on Soare Contracting after browsing the many reviews for different roofing companies. We have been very satisfied with our choice. Very professional and customer service at its best, right from our very first contact with Marion.

Colby, Spiderman of metal roofing in our opinion, started by describing all the steps that would be taken, the first day on the job, which was January 6, 2025.

Although Mother Nature threw us a curved ball with the snow and cold temperature, Colby assured us we could give him a call anytime if need be.  Fortunately, they had secured everything very well so all that was needed was for the snow to melt a little and the degrees to go above the freezing mark.

We were very impressed with the gentlemanly demeanor of Colby and his crew.  They were all polite, friendly and they cleaned the yard at the end of every workday.

We definitely recommend Soare Contracting to anybody who is looking for a reliable company to do business with.

We couldn't have been served better.

Joss F. and Marc L.
Colwood, BC","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gerald German","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLautSMSd7JvIhmQIM9a_q-0oZWDxbvSjN7ufWV2R3qepJSDA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cannot say enough about these great people! Marion booked us in right away to check out a problem with our metal roof. Colby did an inspection and fixed the problem which turned out to be minor. He wasn't going to charge us anything but we insisted he bill for his time.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Isaiah Johnson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJzVgQMwA2W2k-im_V8iAE_Y7YKc2pKwC-IbbM1pb3v2Km4kA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"If they don't care about the safety of others or themselves on the road why would they care about doing a good job on your roof? It's January 17 and there is heavy fog blanketing Vancouver on a dark night. Everyone on the road is exercising caution due to the adverse weather except for two of these guys' trucks. They come absolutely ripping down the highway racing towards Tsawwassen ferry terminal going god knows how many kilometers over the speed limit when you can barely see 20m ahead of you. A car in front of me signals and switches to the left lane ahead of the ascension truck, the acsencion truck almost instintually goes to swerve into the right lane to blaze by someone trying to just get home. He realizes I'm still in the right lane and does a bit of a swerve while slamming the brakes to not hit the guy in front. Meanwhile his buddy come racing up from behind and slams his brakes as we are approaching an intersection. They could have killed people and this was one of the most reckless things I've seen on the road in a long time and I have to commute into Vancouver on the daily.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Wei Chen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKUktmAv2ldskY9oIvem_zQQyEZt9uUVvnbsHgXI9L8CERYdA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"West Isle Industries","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU5eqPgmRuUZ9ubGg0qtCOEAGL66tTf57TSNBG9xrM8KrZaoEsf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"BeSolar recently installed a 37 kW solar system on our shop roof and we could not be more impressed. The communication was excellent from start to finish. Everything was clear, timely, and professional. The quality of the materials and the workmanship was outstanding, and the installation was completed with real attention to detail. It is rare to work with a team that is this organized and this skilled. We recommend them without hesitation.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDhTnzMzvMwPlTVn6ytY8kx&fid=0x0:0x88218221e1ddae4c"],"When":"2025-11-24"},{"Name":"Paul Luchkow","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWjrMwEiiBHSY14pPlmcmzgXwd0DsVNEFA2MJaBPVymCqy817Tx=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We’ve just had our solar system installed and connected over the last few days and our experience with Besolar has been very positive. From initial contact (lots of great info and no pressure sales), help with the planning and logistics, to final installation, everything has gone smoothly.

Our install had challenging aspects but the team was always positive and professional, and happy to answer any questions that I had. The hookup was done the next day and we are very happy to be making our own power!

Everyone in the company that we’ve had contact with has been knowledgable and friendly and I have no hesitation recommending Besolar to anyone wanting to generate their own electricity.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDoxCDXVcqBojuBmoDs9EBA&fid=0x0:0x88218221e1ddae4c"],"When":"2025-10-8"},{"Name":"Bruce Brown","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVpGLB2wggyEhyQmZRdKhCssrXBgFmyzdOQnHRdFgoSEUj_vyaT=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We recently had 7 new solar panels installed on our roof by BeSolar, which were added to an existing system. While we initially thought there was no room for more panels the team at BeSolar were able to reconfigure the system allowing us to almost double the energy produced. We were very pleased to have the work done by Owen, Luke and Kai as well as Adam, the electrician.  The crew was knowledgeable, hard working, polite and answered all of our questions thoughtfully.
We are more than happy to recommend BeSolar to others seeking solar installations!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA0bOM_GZifdzFwvRlKjEQl&fid=0x0:0x88218221e1ddae4c"],"When":"2025-11-25"},{"Name":"jim warder","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIPJY7uFpOh3lZXeujfXx95Ku308SSifw8uJkQQq7_GRV_5CQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I've been interested in renewable energy all of my adult life and this year we decided it was time to take the next step and install PV panels on our home in Victoria. To that end I requested quotes from 4 suppliers. So why did we choose BeSolar for our install? A strong point in BeSolar's favor for me was their affiliation with Brewis Electric, a company with a long history in the region, so I felt they would be able to honor any warranties. Almost as important was their very competitive quote. But it was the initial experience (before the contract was signed) working with the company that made the decision easy. First step, Rod came out to our home to check the roof  was in good shape and get a sense of how everything was situated in relationship to our home. Trees, dormers, neighboring houses, etc. Over the next few weeks he sent several different configurations with associated costs and performance expectations. During this process we spoke on the phone at least a dozen times to go over and adjust the different configurations and panel count that would work best within our budget. His patience throughout this process was commendable. Never once did I feel pressured or obligated to make a decision. Once we were settled on the layout and costs, we signed a contract and paid the deposit on an 8.5 kWatt system (17 panels). Next, Geoff contacted me to schedule an installation date. When the crew showed up, the guys (Nigel, Owen, and Luke) all introduced themselves and then got to work. Geoff also touched base several times over the next few days to check on progress and answer questions. One thing I had been concerned about was damage to my very steep roof (12/12 slope), but the guys all wore soft soled shoes (skate shoes?) and used rigid foam blocks to walk and kneel on while working. This minimized wear on the roof as well as their legs and ankles on such a steep pitch. Safety first! They used the same foam blocks to support the ladder used to hoist the panels up onto the roof. Overall I could see no sign of wear or damage after the install was complete. Throughout the installation it became evident that they both enjoyed the work they were doing and enjoyed working together, even during a wet few days! We chatted a bit about renewable energy and EVs and they mentioned how they enjoyed working for BeSolar, and that both installers and office personnel all worked well together and enjoyed the work. To me, the workplace environment and the job satisfaction of it's employees is hugely important to the quality of work that comes out the door, and that positive environment was on display. On the second last day of the install, Adam the electrician showed up in the morning to install a 240V outlet by my driveway for EV charging and to tie the PV wiring into the electrical panel. Again, Adam was great to work with. Always cheerful and ready to answer any questions I might have. With the days being so short (1st week December) the guys finished up in the dark and we said our good byes. At the end of the next working day, Nigel showed up unexpectedly to check if they'd missed anything in the dark the day before. I am very impressed with their professionalism and the commitment they have to doing a good job. Even little aesthetic touches like routing a cable where it will have the least impact visually. Today Adam called to ask to drop by to attach the last sticker to the main panel for permit approval. Next I was contacted to say an account was setup so I could monitor the power generated by the system. It's just been a very smooth and well coordinated process from start to finish. It's also obvious the company is respected and trusted by BCHydro. I applied for my self generation permit the day after the project was complete and it was approved and the system gained access to the grid immediately. Working with all the folks at BeSolar has been a very enjoyable process, and I don't hesitate to recommend BeSolar or their parent company, Bewis Electric. Thanks BeSolar for such a great experience! 5 Stars!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBz-kxv2Xxvzc_Nn3Y5Wh72&fid=0x0:0x88218221e1ddae4c"],"When":"2025-12-9"},{"Name":"Cindy Meiklejohn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWoQVNUg_TXO0baGJC9uMDPOESuTOmF1y0LIrOvGfb0BywNDgHU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Soooo excited to finally have solar panels on our house! Its just the right thing to do AND with the Government incentive it wasn't even that tough on the pocketbook!
BESOLAR have made this seamless for us, really professional and freindly! Highly recommend 👌","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhANuVOh8DPMFN1A1tO4mCRq&fid=0x0:0x88218221e1ddae4c"],"When":"2025-12-3"},{"Name":"Nathan Schnarr","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKz_koVKTyOgEJ2GZ8SbfsmoYVDvv0ollYEzR2wBRkPLEfC1Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"besolar genuinely impressed me. Probably the best customer service experience I've had in ~10 years. Reid on the sales side was incredibly helpful and knowledgeable. It's not often that someone who wants to sell you something is as great as he was. Everyone that I dealt with in the office was also very friendly and helpful, getting my installation squeezed in the week before Christmas so that I wouldn't lose my greener Homes Grant. The installers were friendly, professional, and tidy. I would 100% recommend besolar.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kyril Cullen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUuASTVtDmt-PA1LlRowSVLMawuKPvqOcqDeDzM_UtScuo7nkHn=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Without hesitation beSolar is the highly recommended solar panel team in Victoria.
Other companies try to entice you through marketing claims of discounts well above the federal/provincial green energy rebates, however, this is due to their initial sales price points being elevated well above beSolar.

After proper evaluation, it is clear to see their is no cost savings via the larger 'discount' the competition is offering but there are a number of factors which are dimishing the quality of service, installation and equipment you will receive compared to beSolar.

beSolar is a subsidiary of a well and long established local electrical company (Brewis Electric).

Their knowledged team of tradespersons have the proper background, training and specialization ensuring their products are highly efficient, suitable for Victoria's weather, and warrantied/guaranteed in a manner which is not found in other competitors (based on my research).

As they are local, installation and after install support is readily available unlike other providers who rely on out of area contractors  which impedes not only quality of service but efficiency in responding with delays of weeks if you have a problem.

Reid and his team were extremely thorough in providing all required awareness, projected costs and savings as well as readily answering all of our technical questions with relevant information supported by industry/relevant experience and facts.

Their no pressure quote visit to our residence was maintained throughout our evaluation of providers which also led to our decision.

Communications and follow up on all process steps of the installation and after install support has been exemplary.

beSolar installation team was a professional and competent crew of friendly, respectful technicians who took pride in their work, respect of our property and my family while on site.  Wonderful experience and highly efficient work despite the brutal heat we were experiencing.

I  strongly recommend beSolar for your solar needs as they have proven, beyond doubt, they are a leader in high quality solar equipment, relationship building with their clients, respectful and professional sales and installtion environments which is becoming a long forgotten realm of historical customer service.

Don't hesitate to contact Reid and his team at beSolar.  We and our sister's family made the choice and couldn't be happier with our entire experience from start to finish as well as our solar system and its stabilty, quality and energy production.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bogdan Bezna","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU3bytyOPe4SUB6iO79io6OjCwxY0QK8mJ7BZyrjUAkLcnjSbfkgQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great team to work with, respectful and courteous when onsite. Install was completed quickly and each step of the way was clear and I felt supported. Would recommend reaching out if you are thinking of adding solar to your home!","Images":null,"When":""}]

I asked Shoreline to do a roof inspection, where we realized that I had so many leaks, and mold growing in the attic, Because the original roofers used cheap materials, and had poor craftsmanship, and sprayed insulation over the vents that are supposed to allow airflow in the attic.
Ed, found a local in Sooke that he works with to supervise the job and take lead. Guy, That’s his name, showed me his rubber roof made by a Canadian company called Euroshield… I saw one more rubber roof. They had done a couple blocks over. Then they told me that one roof will save 750 to 1000 truck tires from going in the landfill… I was sold!
The old roofers had not capped any of the wood, which is why some of the wood frame on the front and back of the house have rotted out multiple times… I’ll never have that problem again because this time I have the best quality roof and I am 100% sure amazing craftsmanship!! Yahoo!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDw4K-MhwE&fid=0x0:0x974bdd0cebd64616"],"When":"2025-3-22"},{"Name":"Hilary Mathieson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW6bPbq_rFdlJ5BB1R14YX9N6gg4zHwzoLIQW8jihMzisyH6M2U=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The crew from Shoreline did an exceptional job on our roof. Ed’s quote was reasonable and he said it would take 5-7 days. He and my contractor communicated well to coordinate timing as certain projects were dependent on the roof being completed.

To my surprise, there was a big crew who worked 3 full days to get everything done! My neighbours also appreciated that my house didn’t look like a tornado passed by.

[{"Name":"Graham Cochrane","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI8ecMHGnXpMneXl65q4EAhwwKE_ETFgKyts80PmTIUO4_iDF8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Proline Roofing just finished up the roof deck, built in torch down gutters, skylights, valley and step flashing after a monumental cedar shake removal.   My crew were exceptionally talented, polite and ensured the property was never left a mess each night.  My house was a big task and all I can say is that you get what you paid for and that is what everyone wants.  10 out of 10 all around for the amazing crew.  Thanks Proline!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"William Wallace","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVeqKK1jUaROyQ86JMH3QLzmpe6h7h5IwGLp1jnwTZjzLMf9qQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Proline Roofing was great to work with and I would highly recommend them.  We had our 25+ year old roof and gutters replaced in March 2023.  The staff from Proline were a pleasure to work with at all stages of the project, right from the first contact with their Admin staff,  the person that provided the quote, the roofers, the supervisor, the gutter installer, etc... I received the quote in October 2022.  They were upfront with the amount of work they had and said it would be roughly 4-5 months before they would get to ours.  They showed up just over 4 months after the quote was provided. The cost was exactly what they quoted me.  There was an additional cost to replace rotten boards but they made me aware of that potential when they provided the quote. The cost to replace the rotten boards was reasonable and they provided me with photos of the areas and the supervisor followed up to answer any questions.  They were very accommodating when I asked that they permanently install two safety hooks for cleaning the gutters.  The quality of the work was excellent as was the cleanup (end of every day) and disposal of the old shingles.  They completed the work in the time they estimated for the roof and the gutters.  They kept us very well informed throughout the process.  Highly recommend this company.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICR95ipHw&fid=0x0:0x2441c67aa79718ab"],"When":"2023-4-13"},{"Name":"Mike H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVvZSvwGmOitFGSrBbYIYytmB82PfjNQymHfjNsW1xwO2gFgLzE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Outstanding service and work, highly recommended! From the very start of getting an estimate, answering our questions and providing all the information we needed to make a decision, to completion of the gutters; everyone at Proline has been phenomenal to deal with. Friendly, professional, flexible, and thorough are just some of the good qualities I would use to describe them. Workmanship is spot-on, the crews are great to work with, and our roof and gutters look awesome. They're diligent about cleaning up at the end of each day, and always keep you informed about their schedule. They were flexible and accommodating for scheduling, and we were quite happy to be fit in where the busy spring season could allow. If you're looking for a professional company to perform quality roof repair or replacement, do yourself a favor and call Proline - anyone I spoke to who worked with them had nothing but good things to say, and it's been a huge relief for us to have such an integral component of our house replaced correctly. And a helpful hint: be thoughtful and provide cold drinks and maybe some treats to the crew each day; it's hot, tiring work and everyone appreciates a little kindness! :-)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDEnurCAw&fid=0x0:0x2441c67aa79718ab"],"When":"2019-4-5"},{"Name":"shumphre77","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLXvyjRW-E3JgjDGbvQnaQRTr_Q_P-WHWDG8yAy-C167u2l4A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Proline team did a great job replacing my gutters and skylights.  It was all done in one day, and the end result looks very good.  All of my interactions with different members of the Proline team were professional and positive.  I would not hesitate to work with them again.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Harleena Gulati","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX_vn7Mi7caw2PPHtMYvGWklxdv1sn9W69M7ESxn70x38B-hgA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Good service until job was done. Poor follow up regarding finishing concerns (advised that they don't paint the step flash so it looks sloppy at the front of the house and a few other things, some shingles not sitting right) . big job > $40K so would have been nice to have some effort to make it look as nice as possible at the end. . No info given regarding warranty when requested (told it would be given after payment). No effort to meet in person to discuss finishing details. Hopefully roof will not need warranty work as i can't imagine it will be easy to deal with them. Biggest thing is that I don't know much about roofs and rely heavily on trusting the company I am working with and that is not there unfortunately.

UPDATE:  upon reading this review, the company reached out to me promptly and paid a visit. They fixed up the finishing as best as they could (fixed some shingles, touched up paint) and gave me some generic information on the warranty (full warranty details to be provided after payment ). I really appreciated their responsiveness in this matter and they really did their best to address my concerns. Thank you Proline.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Susan Christoffersen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLHyyB4bLeRXvp8RhgcPRyjGJyhzs7oMrelXjo0VGYriPprhQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I can't say enough about this company.  They have just reroofed my house and garage.  It was a pleasure to deal with them, from first contact until the roofing was complete.

I am so impressed!  They were quiet (as quiet as roofing can be, lol), arriving quietly in the morning and working what seemed to be non-stop all day; respectful of the boundaries that we set for access to our property, due to having animals; cleaned up every night, even to the point of checking the lawn and around the house for loose nails, and never left before making sure that the roof was watertight overnight if they couldn't reshingle before the next day.  We have a lot of foundation planting and they were very careful not to damage that.  Our roof is very steep and no member of the crew went up on it without a proper safety harness.  We were given a timeline for completion of the work, and it was completed in that timeframe.

The people in the office were very accommodating to our needs and the crew superlative.  I would give them 10 stars if I could.  I would certainly recommend them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Susan Reid","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUKQ1f7_N_0NNVtYfPfQ3yqM6QvdbtQEPibkPSSJpPRHPIbKzWwEw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fabulous service, at my house the following morning after I emailed in at 4:30 pm (before the predicted rain) to repair storm damage. Pro-Line is the original roof installer 2006, our roof complex (mansard-style) and challenging, but terrific job done, very happy, and this company will certainly get my roof replacement in a few years.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID-l-SmaQ&fid=0x0:0x2441c67aa79718ab"],"When":"2022-12-11"},{"Name":"Alex Robinson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI2clKsRNBDqRf-E9etEeZnXzdMrlguFE5VDIs-qjrPkCbNdkA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Architect/client here, Chris was my installer. He was able to troubleshoot installing a non-typical roof gutter that I supplied, a half round gutter and did an excellent job of installing it.

Thank you Chris & Co.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Glad we went with Aerial Roofing for the job!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rick Sieben","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUnd2tEUt-XTm7wEYus__r_OoNU7WscoioaHF35-j7ZtASqg4s=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Okay, disclaimer... I got a new roof done recently by another company while these guys were doing two other roofs on my street, one being my next door neighbour. These are my objective observances of Aerial Roofing in action:

They were thoroughly professional in both safety and task performance. Everyone on the team performed every task. The team was several men with 3 to 4 vehicles and plenty of equipment. They were uniformly dressed and were in and out in three days, 9am to 8pm. The houses were 2 storey, 1,600ft² to 2,000ft² so... you do the math for roof size. They had music going but it was fine.

Cleanup was very thorough for the site and surrounding neighbors. Truly nice work but hey... don't ask me about their cost because I don't know that. I would have known that, because I would have used them had they returned our calls for a quote. We left a message on voice mail, not just once but twice, and got no response (frowny face).

Anyways, I probably would have used them even if they cost more than the roofers we used because they were clearly the better outfit.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tanya Yilla","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJc1NbJWv4IXXOTL_QxOZ4u2df6JosNRjI6ZGBCyd8w3Ts1Tw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Thank you, Tom, Rob, Kyron and the entire team at Aerial!

I’ve been a loyal customer of Aerial Roofing for over 20 years, and I can confidently say they are the best in the business. From the first roof installation to ongoing maintenance, their service has been nothing short of exceptional. Every time I've called for assistance, whether it’s been routine upkeep, an emergency repair, or a full replacement, they've consistently delivered with professionalism, expertise, and care.

What sets them apart is not only the quality of their work but their unwavering commitment to customer satisfaction. They truly stand behind their craftsmanship and products. Over the years, I’ve seen the company grow, but their core values of integrity, reliability, and thoroughness have never changed. They are responsive, always offering clear communication and taking the time to explain every step of the process.

The team at Aerial, uses the latest techniques and highest-quality materials, ensuring long-lasting results that you can count on. They don't just complete a job, they build lasting relationships. I’ve appreciated their willingness to continue supporting me even after all these years. It’s rare to find a company with such a long-standing dedication to its customers, and I’m grateful for the peace of mind they’ve provided.

If you're looking for a trustworthy, top-notch roofing company with decades of experience and a reputation for excellence, you won’t be disappointed choosing Aerial Roofing.

They’ve earned my business and trust for over two decades, and I wouldn’t hesitate to recommend them to anyone.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mike Dunsmuir","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKhifiWS0_O-an6TOnmJ51oJv6b3Vfi-_R9DYwOx4KrrUCXFw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had Aerial Roofing replace our asphalt shingled roof last year. The crew was absolutely amazing, a hardworking pleasant and went above and beyond with fixing old vent ducts and added more roof vents. Super painless experience and would happily recommend this company!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kari Frazer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU-eiNy0Wtsqub8Q6EaRGkZe0rzvjW8K6BOP1nAnJsc_lv0yvsa=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We are grateful for the wonderful team you sent to put on a new roof. They were so polite, hard working, and the clean-up was impressive. They completed the roof in two days and we anticipated much longer. The quoting process and lead-up to the project was also a pleasure thanks to the excellent communication by Tom. We will be most happy to recommend Aerial Roofing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Carmen Morgan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXAF-Qt6gT4GDjAJ8jyeLS-nNjVWeyaGK0dCcZnQme8svS6zkqA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Aerial Roofing did not disappoint! I would hire them again any day. They were responsive on email, on the phone, walked me through the process and gave me different price points and options. The amazing crew worked long days to get the job done before the heavier rains came, and cleaned up the work site every day. What a great team, and a great energy and spirit they brought to the job site. Thank you!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Doug Turner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLJDVEUjK2ns3_imbHZoTffnj2JvP87nPmt2ljQh3_tkOJ7cA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We used Aerial Roofing 26 years ago for the original installation of our flat roof.  The roof stood up well but eventually everything needs replacing.  I contacted several roofing companies, including ones I have used on other properties (Phil Smith Roofing),who said they were too busy to bother providing a quote or a recommendation.  The ones that did offer quotes (Top Line) offered very high prices with no guarantee on the price or when they might get to it.  Aerial offered a fair price, which did not change, and they provided a set time period to complete the work, which they followed through on.  Their employee J.D. and all other staff were competent, hard working, honest, and considerate of the homeowner's needs.  I would definitely use Aerial Roofing again and recommend everyone needing roofing to talk to Aerial.  They do not take your business for granted and unlike other contractors working in the current building boom, they don't hire just anyone who can swing a hammer and call them a carpenter.  They provided us with a new roof that will outlast our time here, and they did it at a fair price and on time.  Unlike the other roofing companies we contacted, I highly recommend Aerial Roofing.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Before and after photos are attached. I highly recommend Lanny.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICKnrrC6gE&fid=0x0:0xa7a1cc061d80139b"],"When":"2021-4-6"},{"Name":"Jun & Dy Razal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLGU6XX2RIwcxHEOmaTn2z7AvIcW1MpDlGjGYVSE_o5EY8EUA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Brambleberry was our choice for a recent renovation from among the contractors who responded with a proposal for our project. Our There were 3 main deliverables - 1) Fireplace redesign; 2) Powder room reno and 3) Kitchen renovation. The big ones were #2/#3. The Brambleberry team provided the prep work and finishing work - demolition, electrical, plumbing, painting, tiling, backsplash, external wall venting among others.

Key things why Brambleberry stands out:

1) Communication - progress reporting and billing and documented exchanges of what has been agreed on; explain things in plain language to clarify a deliverable.

2) Attention to details where it matters - e.g., providing options for grout colors, matching to our color scheme, precise placement of ligting and fireplace mantle and lots more

3) Planning, Scoping and Execution  - documented project tracking as per project plan; there were timeline slippage but course corrected
4) Reasonable pricing  - not the lowest in the overall scheme of things, the money paid was for the value received

5) Change management - despite scope changes, the team was willing to undergo additional tasks that were challenging with the overall budget not dinged.

Lastly, it is seldom you gain friends and have fun from this kind of projects. We had fun and gained friends. The anxiety at start turned into trust.

These guys can deliver. We are looking forward to our next project.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDu4qWOQw&fid=0x0:0xa7a1cc061d80139b"],"When":"2022-8-17"},{"Name":"Betty Graf","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW9spmPl-q0xAoNVLp5i8cdVEVWNGG1-L_gDVUTs6a_h2CoHmk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lanny provided amazing service. We highly recommend Brambleberry Residential Services and already have an additional project in the works with Lanny.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alex Tigi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUrjkzTyw05QsmOtfCYl2yX38N5byhLbWK0TfgGJJ2HYHWlVXR51Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We just completed a job with Lanny and couldn't be happier. user_reviews: [{"Name":"SandyL","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVyukJNm-G6Y0UICXSFnWVhOy9PENXe5b7joJobtvTm7INHnsGT=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I highly recommend RR Roofer Rider. I received four different quotes for replacing a 35 year old roof and decided to go with them after Vincent (the owner) came by personally, to give me a quote. He went onto the roof to inspect it and came inside the house to view the attic and answer all my questions. I found Vincent very personable, knowledgeable and honest, he put me at ease right away. I received the quote the same day. I was very pleased that his crew were able to start the new roof in the cold month of January and complete it in a reasonable amount of time which was a lot of work since the old metal roof had been placed on top of the much older asphalt roof.  The foreman suggested installing a skylight for the bathroom to bring in more light and make use of a large ceiling opening that had housed old lighting. While they were replacing the roof was the perfect time to install the skylight. The crew were friendly and polite whenever I spoke to them and did a great cleanup job when the work was complete. They also took photos of the new roof for me which I appreciated.  Vincent also came by after completion to inspect the work that was done. Deciding to spend money on a new roof isn't easy but I really felt comfortable in my decision to go with RR Roof Rider.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCA9O-ZbA\u0026fid=0x0:0x2d7bf3266dcbe5d6"],"When":"2025-1-29"},{"Name":"Michael Barker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL1fVG5iXjBdlIN4WiOo0lip_wzSIBXc_-7lDrdVzL885Etgg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After researching several companies I decided to select Roofrider. I would recommend this company who wants a professionally installed roof that you can be proud of.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Darrell Greenwood","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXECZcMWrVZvWF1jhE2KT04FIoLSU6W2WbUTYFfCvyNe4EBwM0Y=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a very stressful situation when our roof started leaking, and we needed help fast. Highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rob Robson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI43820hwGjA4wGpMwVtUD7fqlr-fv9or3zke1xXkfaTvFRmQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Right from the start Vincent and his Roof Rider team surpassed my expectations. They kept my driveway tidy and clean as there was a lot of equipment, supplies to be used. When they were finished, they took me on a walk around to ensure I was satisfied with their work and the cleanup. I really appreciated Vincent’s visit to ensure I was happy with the work and if I had any questions or comments. Really amazing Customer Service!! I will definitely suggest using them to anyone that I know. Thanks!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID9rayxGg\u0026fid=0x0:0x2d7bf3266dcbe5d6"],"When":"2024-3-19"},{"Name":"Peter Wan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL-V-TiKU2JKwD8xARkwpRaxEU_STSkgtjzcd3JA0y1mTN4eg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I highly recommend Roof Rider.  Vincent (the owner) will give you a quote that uses only high quality materials and makes sure all aspects meet or are beyond industry standards.  The new vents and new flashings look much better than the previous generation that was on there before.  In fact, the new roof looks so much better than what it replaced.  We had two new 4’x4’ skylights installed at the same time and Roof Rider gave me quotes for them that were very competitive.  I thought they were a great deal!  Now the house looks very much brighter with natural light coming into the house as never before.  Once the team arrives at your home, they work fast and typically can finish off your roof in a few days.  Vincent is personable, honest and reliable and knows just about everything in the roofing business.  Highly recommended.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICalufnXQ\u0026fid=0x0:0x2d7bf3266dcbe5d6"],"When":"2021-7-30"},{"Name":"Anna Heckmann","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLE4qxjYgaRh2tlcUsNz4ErZKdQUzSgLXrE4BFiexqKyGcdBQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After purchasing a new home I had roof rider come give me a roof replacement quote on a 23 year old roof. Vincent looked at my roof and said exactly the same thing and pointed out some things to be aware of such as don’t remove the moss at this point, careful of your skylight and don’t fix siding until you do the roof. I truly valued all of this information as it was in our best interest and not a business trying to sell me something we didn’t need yet. I will definitely come back to roof rider when we need them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Maria Hendrikx","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU-eKDiZ93tQfo63ei-tfkWNOCu7ZRygY5yD9Fazb_DfAk6E2gp=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Staff at Roof Rider are always courteous and efficient. [{"Name":"Stephan Jacob","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX4BZ9oS_fDXW8AteWpuAAn7KtyaxXEZcgm-f4HJZHgRH_O1WNm=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Got a new roof just before x-mas. Excellent work / fast / clean. Craftsmanship seems to be flawless - I'm not a roofer - but everything got done, no more leaks, they removed an old chimney while they were up there and replaced a couple of dodgy plywood sections they found once they removed the old shingles. Every thing was done on time and on budget, including working late into the evening when we had a storm coming. Very tidy during install and after the work was completed. Friendly staff, good communication and very reasonably priced. The only thing is the paperwork could be improved upon (i.e. receipt for first instalment) ;) Five stars all around! Thank you.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCR62li2faWu2E0Amh-6AqT&fid=0x0:0x378dedb5c9ed7a76"],"When":"2026-1-23"},{"Name":"Graham Bennett","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIac7gWlMbwqik_01icqktJxSWSOmvJRK963ilKWZw5PHTTgg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Started So Well and Ended So Badly

I used Square Deal to install a new roof and new gutters on our detached garage. Their quote was competitive and we authorized them to proceed. After some delay they completed both jobs, with one exception. Due to the presence of a tree at one corner of the garage, they had to leave completion of the roofing and gutter until the tree was removed. We paid the entire invoice in good faith.

When we removed the tree, we requested that they come back and finish up. That was in November 2021. Despite following up with them several times (and being assured they would come and finish), they have never come back. When I contacted them again last week, they advised that I should 'deal with it in another way'.

I have attached a photo of what I guess Square Deal considers to be a complete job. There are lots of roofers in Victoria - I'd recommend you find one that will complete the job they were paid for and that seems to leave out Square Deal.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC27JO36wE&fid=0x0:0x378dedb5c9ed7a76"],"When":"2022-4-14"},{"Name":"Nic Stankov","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVLoaLLSj9k-WaYmGG68xQVrfi-kLBpcUfFjtsAKjPO9yrzwv4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We sprung a couple of leaks in our roof over a two month period. We spoke with several roofing contractors and decided to work with Square Deal Roofing. Jordan was very professional and thorough. He listened when I had questions and gave solid answers and advice. We decided to have our roof replaced and went with malarkey Vista 40 yr for tiles and had all the badger boards and fascia replaced along with our gutters. We even decided to have the fascia boards wrapped in black aluminum to preserve them. Jordan's team was very meticulous in their work, quick, clean, and kept the noise to a minimum. We would recommend Square Deal Roofing without hesitation. Oh and the price was very competitive as well.
Update - we just had ken in to replace most of the vents on our new 90's house  and repair a few downspouts - Ken is very quick to respond and did great work :) Thanks so much!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Peter Bourne","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJmi249G3CyQ7keQiu8XlCKNUMF2MVkJUKlDUicL3d2sCRtdQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have been dealing with Square Deal Roofing for many years, and it's always been a great experience! Ken and Jordan replaced the roof on my previous home about 9 years ago. After I moved, the cedar shingle roof on my new house looked pretty ragged, but Ken did an inspection and said I could get several more years out of it -- and I did. But the time was up, and I just had them replace a rental house roof, and my own house and garage roof in Oct/Nov 2019. I was diligent and got a few other quotes, but their quote was the best. And it was easy to hire them because I knew they would be fair and do a great job -- and they did! The whole team was fast and efficient. They made sure to protect my and my neighbour's property when they did the tear-off. The new roof looks great (and even impressed my developer-neighbour). The yard was left looking great both during and at the end of the job. Ken and Jordan are friendly and great to deal with. I've already passed their name on to two friends who need roofing services, and I would not hesitate to recommend them to anyone!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mary Davies","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUt8fVm-UWqQtIRwT_vTcooFLnJq1XBR5oRh2jwTD734FVVU3sq=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I highly recommend Square Deal Roofing! I was very pleased with the work that was done and the pricing was also competitive. Jordan and crew were prompt, tidy and hard working. I was very impressed with their daily cleanup routine leaving the space in great shape each day. Now that I have a lovely new roof I won't be needing a roofer myself anytime soon but if I were, I'd use Square Deal Roofing again in a heartbeat :)","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Whitney Larzelere","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ-LHirR4O_h1mD0eYZ0N7Auqa2UAGMYQornHviD1txj2NlkA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a wonderful experience working with Square Deal roofing. From start to finish, Jordan had excellent communication. His team was hard working, efficient and delivered a beautiful product. Thank you Jordan! I will definitely be recommending your team!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jan Wallace","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV4y4mVubqBuoj0g-D1Bs3a1qGQpWHHcvQUu6IV1VQV4jx9100=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ken & Jordan are wonderful. I 5-star highly recommend them for your new roof or even repair work. Ken repaired my roof 2 times, then when I had the money to have the new roof, had an excellent experience. They are timely, efficient, pleasant, hard-working AND reasonably priced. Contact me anytime to give a reference!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Danny Lake","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLmPNgUaHvDamcm1NvN9N5mOCi9TF3vbfMjXqYxEH6O6BAHUA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jordan came by and installed 2 roof vents, and installed ducting in my attic to connect the new vents to my bathroom fans. [{"Name":"Mike Spaz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLLkDpH9_ZrWRkv_LvxNuSzSPvpth1it0weGjRd5WTju_IPJA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jared is a pleasure to deal with.  He's professional, responsive, accommodating and prices his jobs fairly.  We had a leak, which we originally tried to repair; however, when it was determined we needed to replace the roof, Jared walked us through the process. He outlined the required work and broke down the quote in detail for us, then, was flexible and accommodating when scheduling the work. Jared and crew were professional and polite while on site, did high quality work (explaining things as they went), and left the side clean and safe each work day and upon completion of the job.  We highly recommend Brokop for your roofing needs.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAM2QHZOPZQ5r9n87dVCuRe&fid=0x0:0x87f969989ea93cd3"],"When":"2026-2-4"},{"Name":"Gloria Walker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVjF-usz_lSPhq9DqBpKxGASw0eo05aar8vPzeAHEr4IcPQ6kE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Firstly, I would like to point out that I own the front half of a front/back duplex, and the owners of the back half were not interested in having their half re-roofed.  This necessitated additional alternations to clearly define my one-half.

Jared Brokop, the owner/manager of Brokop Roofing, was an absolute pleasure to deal with and was very responsive throughout the job.  Initially he spent time up in my attic and noted a number of things that were not up to today's standards, including no plywood under the shingles, bathroom ventilation pipes that exited into the attic and poor ventilation generally.  All of the above were corrected and he installed an Omni Ridge ventilation system.

I noted that his team were like a FAMILY and worked like a well-oiled machine -- very professional, courteous, hard working and rendered a very high degree of workmanship.  They started promptly each day, and left the property in a tidy and safe condition.  It has been my observation that these qualities are a rarity in most trades, in today's world.  They brought in a large dumping container for the old shingles and laid down tarps on the ground to catch any falling debris, with special attention to my plants and shrubs below.  The grounds were kept clean and organized throughout the two day installation.  Once they were finished, they went over my entire driveway with a magnetic sweeper to catch any loose nails, so as to eliminate me experiencing a flat tire.

The shingles and labour warranty are fully transferable to any future buyer, which increases my house value.  I also noted that his company has an A+ Better Business Rating.

UNQUESTIONABLY, I would HIGHLY recommend Brokop Roofing to anyone that is looking for a superior roofing job.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Shayla Baumeler","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI-gkuZcWFjEN1aTRbRQWGI-725eKw12qkdkE95_f9OikSxHg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently purchased a home in Victoria and had some concerns with my roof. Jared was communicative, kind and quick to come assess the situation. His team then came to do a few repairs on my roof. Jared truly went above and beyond, and I would highly recommend Brokop Roofing!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anna Fisher","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIjteToMEKsaAQo6qappHAnfLxTt4mnE8oanolUkSKpbP6SUw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jared and his guys did a fantastic job on my roof!! They were so efficient in getting it done in just a couple days for a very good price. The quality of their work is amazing!! Jared has been an absolute pleasure to deal with and very responsive throughout the job. I would definitely recommend them","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mark Appleton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUKe1P2F0bTPUUfuKxMoTw6DZCAe4apEYVqBRrZFifWaIFF8Xc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We are in the process of completing the roofing of our small three unit townhouse strata located in the Rockland area of Victoria. As the attached photo confirms our was  a reasonably complex project, and one that was critical to maintaining the ambiance and charm of the property. Extreme care needed to be exercised in order to limit any disruption or damage to the established gardens while meeting timelines that aligned with other trades including painters, new gutters, siding etc.

The Strata looked at several companies and received a number of quotes before  unanimously agreeing to go with Jared Brokop of Brokop Roofing. Thank you for the quick and effective service!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"jay kent","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUFzdF0QlbAf4AHy2HR0dQnx7BYbmWSSdn7PINE7W6qJjWzulyg4g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I worked on a movie that came to the island and filmed a movie at the end of 2025 and into early 2026. Our main location was a residential house which required cleaning after our shoot was complete. We reached out to this company and requested a quote for a basic clean of the main floor and a small guest suite. Their original quote was $8900.00. This quote was given without an on site assessment. Well that seemed like a bit much so we invited them out to see the house and they did come. After they came we asked for a revised quote but they told me that they weren't comfortable with altering it. I then started looking for other companies and found some that were happy to do the job for less. When we called Servicemaster and told them we would no longer need them and they instantly came back with a new estimate that was $2900.00. (6K below the first number they suggested it would cost to clean a 1500 square foot main floor of a house). So because this company had already done some upholstery cleaning at this home and the owners liked their work we decided to hire them. On the day of the cleaning they showed up and cleaned the house. The crew of six people were in and out within about 4 hours. The next day I asked for an itemized invoice for the work. They sent the same quote for $2900.00. Again we requested an itemized invoice and they then broke down the costs as such - $65 an hour per cleaning tech x6 = $1200.00. Uhmmm okay I guess that makes sense because they were actually working/cleaning for about 3 hours. Also, good on you for paying your crew somewhere hopefully in the neighbourhood of $65 an hour ( cough cough). But the kicker was the extra charge for cleaning the outside deck ($500) and the interior floor ($600). So explain to me how these cleaning charges (deck&floor) aren't covered by the hourly cleaning charge per person that we are paying. In my 20 plus years of film work I have never come across a company that was so dishonest and deceitful. I am definitely accustomed to paying a bit more because we have tight deadlines but this company has disheartened me so much that it came to me writing a google review which says a lot.","Images":null,"When":""}]

The only issues I've ever had has been inconsistency between what their computer says for stock and what their actual stock is.

The office staff here are super friendly - as is expected with a family business - and super accommodating. They aren't always the cheapest, but the complete service you get greatly offsets that.

Both locations have great managers who are more than happy to help out with questions regarding products. The downtown location has a extremely skilled roofer on its staff, which is an invaluable asset for people with specific installation and system questions.

Their crane operators are skilled  and they have a surprising selection for both tools and materials (despite the sporadic stocking issues).

They're a fantastic alternative to the bigger chains on the island - shop local!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Don St. Germain","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVEzrtRjguCxC0uJmJbymTObSfEiNnoHqv3USgkVi5b0rHxRskP=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I needed a couple of pieces of flashing for a client's deck on a future listing, and dropped in to see Ken's Roofing on the advice of a good friend from Acme Gutterworks.   Not only were they able to make them on the spot (literally within 10 minutes) but they fit perfectly.  Keep up the good work!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Trevor Soare","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVmJjdmJoSyK_wrR3lOUCbi__bmAYHRV4WU792pKbpbv69KJk0H=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our favourite supplier. Great service and everyone is very knowledgeable","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Phil Bailey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXZAlMOGalr1cUj-VNZ_2IjkK7tldf759Pubfw3Q79Lmbardwab=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It is easy to give a company a good review when everything goes smoothly, but I think that it is even more important to know how a company handles the situation when things don't go quite as planned.

Recently, after Ken's Roofing Supplies delivered a load of shingles and other supplies to my home, I noticed some minor damage to my property caused by the delivery truck. This was a simple accident and was not caused by any malice or neglect.

When I contacted the company and sent a couple of photos, Alex responded immediately. The company took responsibility and we came to a quick and very reasonable agreement to get the damage repaired. The repairs were dealt with very quickly and very much to my satisfaction.

Clearly, Ken's Roofing Supply is a company with integrity and excellent customer service and I would not hesitate to recommend them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"John Szostakiwskyj","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL3S3EY9h3hZ1sl3dNrVjpXiNVYZ7jN0w703wuewTqLnfv0cw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Love these guys. Had a steep 12/12 pitch yesterday, guys showed up early before I had the roof peak entirely prepped for the load. Normally this would force loading onto existing roof. As tear off and water proofing before a load is essential. Moving bundles repeatedly on steep roofs is a waste of time, money and work.
Instead I was personally handed what was necessary, met with smiles and patience.
40 minutes later the roof was entirely loaded and the remainder of my job will be swift. (Unless this damn snow persists)
There isn't always room in their schedule for this but they don't earn a dime by waiting.
Thanks guys, you rock!","Images":null,"When":""}]

They came as scheduled on different days to water proof first, and then shingle the roof... just in time for 2 days of rain!
The next morning (while it was raining) they came back to load up all the shingle and flashing cut ends, plastic packaging, and cardboard.  Not only did they load it up, they kept it all separated in order to properly recycle the recyclables.
The crew were all respectful, and very good to have on site.  I know I will be using them again!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICC3vXR3AE&fid=0x0:0x9d1141f46ccc5be4"],"When":"2020-8-24"},{"Name":"SV Passat II","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWTAK8dyuT2qb6gItVqMb9UbJnTbWkLDv_Cr9rcYT34ndfYg8Bf_w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We contacted five Victoria roofing contractors for a quote to replace our home's flat roof. Only Go More Roofing; spent the time to listen to our input; provide usefull advise; and prepare two quotes based on the options we wished to consider. They were slightly more then the other quote we received, but we selected them based on the extra time they spent. The roof has just been completed. We are very happy with the result. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Tanis Nijjar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX-R_Npi7FlIOMhEeHKPks_vP097a5h0u0iNQTYiKgLQdp6lSwA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were really happy working with Vincent and his crew at Roof Rider. Due to a roof leak in the heavy spring rain I frantically called 20 roofing companies Roof Rider returned our inquiry and Vincent assessed the roof within a few days. Providing an extensive and inclusive quote/work order, that was very comprehensive. They offer GAF warranty on materials, and the longest number of years on labor that we compared with other companies. We experienced very respectful tradespeople and office staff. Answering all questions and following up with us, even when in the busy season.  The crew was thorough in the removal of the old roof, installation and cleaned up efficiently. We have no concerns or felt anything could have made our experience better.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Robert Oyler","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWHepGfUpwpbHMq70N23bu0Yd2u9eHRUxVrGqhnzY62iYhfKu0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":""I recently had the pleasure of working with Roof Rider to update my roof, and I couldn't be more impressed with the entire experience. From start to finish, they demonstrated the utmost professionalism, making the entire process seamless and stress-free.

The team at Roof Rider provided a service that was not only top-notch but also reasonably priced. It's refreshing to find a company that values both quality and affordability. Their efficiency was remarkable, completing the project in a timely manner without compromising on the meticulous attention to detail that sets them apart.

What stood out the most, however, was the friendly and communicative nature of the entire staff. From the initial consultation to the final inspection, every member of the team was approachable and eager to address any questions or concerns I had. They kept me well-informed at every stage of the project, ensuring I felt confident and informed throughout.

The quality of their work speaks volumes about their dedication to excellence. The end result exceeded my expectations, and it's evident that Roof Rider takes pride in delivering nothing short of exceptional craftsmanship.

Overall, I highly recommend Roof Rider for anyone in need of roofing services. They've set a high standard for professionalism, affordability, efficiency, and friendliness. It's rare to find a company that excels in every aspect of their service, but Roof Rider has certainly achieved that and more. Thank you for a job well done!"","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bob Joseph","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKciTPN1lOY6vrD4QrRhApVHsmB5NhWlNjk5LFG4JMdgAR3rw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had Roof Rider do a combination membrane/metal roof with a lot of
replacement sheeting and all new facia boards. The job was a significant
amount of work and not inexpensive, but I am satisfied with the result. There is no doubt my house has risen in value due to the work, but more importantly it just looks great and the workmanship by installers Mark and Leslie is top shelf. Vincent from Roof Riders is a fair man who stands behind his work and product. He is also very accessible for a busy man, and will return your calls and answer any questions or concerns expeditiously with a pleasant and professional attitude. I have no problem recommending Roof Rider for all your roofing needs. Bob","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Deborah Dickie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLIkXx_ea5GN_36an4Ndbg5lmtnJTUnYdz3ILvuwL3Oy5wEPw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My home received some heat damage when a large hot fire happened directly from behind. Inspections were done, with repairs being necessary. Vincent Cummings was the one that inspected my roof. He was very thorough and provided an excellent report that included detailed information and photos of all areas of my roof. I followed up with a phone call for further explanation. He was patient and helpful answering all my questions. He was very professional yet friendly. Very easy to talk to. I believe my adjuster will now be proceeding with Vincent's recommended repair. Thank you very much for the great service","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Laura L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW5O-jNwrEZsgKaE95G4ouqmtPi7GU5ZYl5gDy9jCRpZmWgtqo=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The initial examination was thorough and a venting problem in relation to two bathroom vents and the range hood vent in the attic was noted.  Some mold had formed on some of the OSB boards as a result of this improper venting.  Vincent's approach was to replace the affected wood, and reroute the vents from their exit points in my soffits to vents in the roof where they belong.  I felt Vincent looked well beyond the roof installation to ensure my house was in top shape and free of issues.  The roof installation went smoothly and my crew worked very hard and efficiently.  His gutter subcontractor was amazing and my new gutters look great.  I have lived in this house for 16 years and my bathrooms always took forever to clear after a shower.  I just accepted this as normal.  With the vents being properly routed I no longer have this problem.  My bathrooms are clearing properly now and I was really surprised in the difference this made.  I'm sure the mold issues will not reappear due to Vincent's expertise.  I highly recommend Roof Rider.  They were easy to work with and I felt I was in excellent hands.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chris Brenan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIwNcTKxMNLhD0Ubr1_JYNAYpIlzRpPrHL3Ahquh_nZgnsGFg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Vincent took the time to review the roof inside and out, identified areas of concern, provided a summary and advised that I didn't actually need the roof replaced at this time. I was so grateful for his honesty and integrity and will definitely be using RoofRider and Vincent's crew when the time comes to proceed with the big job.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"extrasweater","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI0PCi6eoKzVK61FBPkiJO66HqJAmjk8vkFSnBCArQEkjP9Rw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Having my house re-roofed was a job I was dreading - it's a significant investment and the stakes are far too high to make a bad decision.  Owner Vincent's father ran a roofing company for decades so their expertise and commitment is long-standing - rare in an industry which can be notorious for fly-by-night-ers. I am not only pleased but delighted with every aspect of this job - the respectful attitude and performance of the crew, and the transformation of my home's appearance.  I went with rubberized Malarkey shingles - Legacy XL, which are apparently 20% thicker than regular Legacy, but even from the street this quality upgrade is discernible. When the roof is wet, it almost looks like I have wood shingles.  Since I work at home, RR dedicated a larger crew to get the job done faster, but there was no compromise in the quality of workmanship. They also pride themselves on excellent service post-completion.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Parent wass","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIFWllo6F0wW7I9reqIWb4BdlM3DQ8iYyS77_rY-GiH3uzDPA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I'm going just be honest here.  These guys have a superior product and you get what you pay for.  We got estimates from 3 companies to replace our 18 year old roof with some water damage. Roof Riders cost was not the cheapest nor the most expensive. Hard to compare Apple to apples because everyone has a different product,warranty and extras.   The good...Vincent responded quickly, did a thoroughl inspection on the outside and crawled into the attic in inspected for problems there(the others didn't).  He provided suggestions to relocate an exhaust vent(others companies didn't)which I was happy to hear because it leaked and caused water damage to the drywall in our bathroom.  Installed a solar roof vent, 2 roof anchors to tie off when I'm on the roof and modified 2 eves troughs/downspots with custom modifications. This area was the main reason we had the roof inspected and replaced because it had caused water damage.   These items were NO CHARGE on the final bill! The crew was professional, no load blaring music, no constant profanity,just showed up and got it done.  The did clean up daily and keep my wives plants covered and protected.  Finished 95% of the job on time in 4 days. The look, the quality the responsiveness of the quote,  keeping us in the loop on what was going on  all this was A+.   The not so good ...they did squeeze us in while the other couldn't get us in til August, but they were still delayed from the planned start date .  I know weather is a factor and out of their control.   The last 5% of the job, final cleaning of eves trough, eve trough modifications took about 7 extra days but in the end it was done and done right.  The disposal bin  took a few extra days to remove and was a pain but again RR called the company 2x for us the bin guy was just not responsive.  We did end up with a nail in out tire and some debris was left BUT all in a these guys did a good job.  Hey I'm old school and I put Vincent through the paces.  I want the job done perfect and I have high expectations and Vincent and him team got it done.  Every question every request, every call RR handled this job with authentic care and a desire to get it right.  Great local company in sooke.  Would higher them again and highly recommend them.","Images":null,"When":""}]

If you talk to him nicely, he might be able to bring you supplies as long as they fit in the rolling tool crib.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICltffBCw&fid=0x0:0x83095f1911725a99"],"When":"2023-11-23"},{"Name":"Graeme H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLz68hla75Dd85gJV_uKtzRbb-EAXyB-YkJvA57BrwP3AyC0g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Whatever you do, don’t show up expecting anything within a half hour of close. Went to buy a door handle of all things and the guy at the counter was complaining to me about how everyone was showing up at the end of the day. Also laughed at the fact I was only buying one of them, which is just ridiculous.

Then, upon driving into the yard to go to the door warehouse, I was AGAIN reminded by the attendant that they were almost closed (it was 20 minutes to close). I was so fried at that point that I just about asked for a refund.

I get that this place caters to contractors but at least try to run a friendly business. Every time I go in there the staff are rude, like they expect me to know everything already. It’s gross. Only reason I go there now is if I’m desperate. Great job, Slegg.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"James Sellers","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKsGX6HWmsmiAmp3Pj9ZE4qy728VnDknmqJ1-JjgEXTESsRMQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jason, Garage Door Manager, helped us decide whether to restore our 30 year old door or replace it. The door arrived on time and the installer, Gord, did a super job.

We ended up with a door manufactured in Alberta from Canadian steel that perfectly matches our home's exterior. Slegg exceeded our expectations. title: Aerial Roofing Ltd.
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Jim Tomash","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK453b3XNGeyuMW5nBwJ9ZbrL61JGZXA5gOK3Z4M3BRUfrZJw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Aerial was out to replace my roof in December right before the great snowstorm of 2022.

The crew (Sergio) did a great job, were respectful, pleasant, and extremely hard workers.   They also took into account the weather and worked quickly to ensure there would be no issues with the coming rain/snow.

Aerial provided me with one of the most competitive quotes of the 6 other roofing companies that I had come out, and were quick to respond to any questions I had throughout the process.  Tom the owner & Kyron were really helpful when it came to choosing the right shingle & color.

Unfortunately due to backlogs, it did take 6+ months for my roof to be replaced from when I had the estimate done, but I was aware it could take that long.

I opted for the high profile capping which was quite reasonably priced and really adds a nice look to the roof.

Overall I cannot recommend Aerial and Sergio & his crew enough.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICBs-LruAE&fid=0x0:0x82d27a7f58b05366"],"When":"2023-1-3"},{"Name":"Wil van der Pijl","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ9ezKpO8qegCajqm-vVHuzWIH875UFJdUc0sEh01L2E6SvmQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"There is only one term to describe the quality of this business, " Master class craftsmanship" from quote to finish complete professionalism!!! Master class Craftsmanship, thank you so very much!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDpvp3reQ&fid=0x0:0x82d27a7f58b05366"],"When":"2023-8-22"},{"Name":"Emma Puddy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIFSk04R5yW7uIlEROCHD_nV6zwBV7TM3ge9SY76EDpOllWkQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our car battery died while getting groceries and you were happy to give us a boost.
